item.echoes.echo_crystal.desc: Reveals the echoes of those who walked here.
item.echoes.echo_crystal.manual.disabled: Manual recording is disabled on this server.
commands.echoes.optout.success.visibilit: You will no longer leave echoes.
commands.echoes.optout.success.display: You will no longer see echoes.
commands.echoes.optout.success.all: Opted out of all echo tracking.
commands.echoes.optin.success.visibility: You will now leave echoes again.
commands.echoes.optin.success.display: You will now see echoes again.
commands.echoes.clear.success: Cleared %s echoes in a %s block radius.
